Ready to find out how EQS can make your regulatory workflows 10x more efficient? Schedule a zero-pressure demo to see how we can support your organization operationalize compliance, data privacy, sustainability management and investor relations.

  • See our solutions in action, customized for you

Sustainability Management

Sustainability reporting
Platform
All use cases on one platform. The sustainability cockpit.
CSRD
Collect data across your organization. Compliant reporting.
CO2 Footprint
Calculate your CO2 footprint. Reduce emissions.
Double Materiality
Understand relevant sustainability topics. Take action.
VSME
Report and share essential ESG data.
Taxonomy
Measure taxonomy-alignment. Become more sustainable.
CO₂ Targets
Set science-based climate targets. Plan and achieve reductions.
Product Carbon Footprint
Analyze emissions per product. Optimize your portfolio sustainably.

About us
About our company
Who we are and why you should trust us
About EQS
Careers
EQS Group / About EQS Group / Careers
Career at EQS

Creating trusted companies

The key to our success are talented people who bring passion to the table every day, take responsibility, and support each other to create a culture of integrity.
Explore our current openings

Why Work with Us?

Purpose-Driven Work

Join us in our mission to create a more transparent and trustworthy corporate world,

making a positive impact on society and the environment.

Team Spirit Forged by Transparency and Trust

We cultivate team spirit and foster a culture of continuous feedback, encouraging collaboration, ownership, and innovation,

to create a supportive environment that drives personal and professional growth.

Innovative Environment

Be part of a pioneering team that uses the latest technology to provide award-winning solutions.

Our commitment to long-term innovation not only solves today’s challenges but also shapes the solutions of tomorrow, keeping us ahead in a rapidly evolving industry.

Global Growth and Influence

As part of the EQS team, you have the opportunity to make history.

We are expanding from a niche European market to becoming a major global player. Join us on our journey to enhance transparency and trust worldwide.

Explore our current openings!

KPIs of EQSGroup

Locations worldwide

98

Client organizations trust us

Our Values

Team Spirit

Team Spirit
We have empathy and support/respect each other.

Passion

Passion
We love what we do and are driven to achieve.

Ownership

Ownership
We think like owners and act sustainably towards our planet and society.

Transparency

Transparency
We are open-minded and actively share information.

Trust

We are honest, trust each other and value a flat hierarchy.

Explore our current openings!

Our Work Principles

Put the client first

Be ambitious and humble

Challenge decisions, but once they‘re made, commit wholly to them

Have integrity and demand it from others

Confront brutal facts, yet never lose faith

Take responsibility for poor results (“look in the mirror“)

Give praise for good results (“look out of the window”)

Make mistakes, but learn from them (“fail well”)

Support and develop your team members

Lead by example

Explore our current openings!

Empower 2 Grow

A supportive environment for your individual development. Set personal goals, receive ongoing feedback, and take advantage of resources like internal trainings and our leadership development programs.

 Living Our Values

Take responsibility for a variety of tasks and find your way to make your own personal impact with us. Participate in our Corporate Sustainability Day and get involved in our initiatives to create a fair, sustainable and responsible workplace.

 Vibrant Team Culture

Enjoy regular team events, parties, and a talented international team with a common goal that unites us. We foster a vibrant and supportive community with initiatives designed to promote your personal and professional growth. 

 Flexible Work-Life Balance

Our hybrid-working model offers the flexibility to balance in-office and remote work in a way that suits your lifestyle. With ample vacation days, you’ll have the time to recharge and stay motivated on this exciting path.

 Comprehensive Benefits

Benefits may vary per location, but we offer a wide range of perks, including additional vacation days, flexible working hours, and several initiatives like mentorship programs and DEI week and team events to ensure you thrive both personally and professionally.

What We Do

Understanding Compliance & Ethics, Data Privacy, Investor Relations and ESG

  • Compliance & Ethics
  • Data Privacy
  • Sustainability Management
  • Investor Relations (IR)

Compliance & Ethics means ensuring that a company follows the laws, regulations, and guidelines that apply to its business activities. We help organizations and their employees conduct business in a legal and ethical manner, safeguarding against fraud, corruption, and other legal risks. Compliance matters because it protects a company’s reputation, promotes ethical behavior, and ensures transparency.

Data Privacy refers to the policies and practices designed to protect personal and sensitive information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. It involves ensuring that data is collected, stored, processed, and shared securely and in compliance with legal standards. Data Privacy matters because it Safeguards Personal Information, Builds Customer Trust, Mitigates Risks of Data Breaches, and Ensures Regulatory Compliance.

With our solutions, companies can easily collect and monitor ESG data, ensuring compliance with regulations and facilitating transparent reporting. Our tools support sustainable practices, strengthen governance, and enhance social responsibility.

Investor Relations (IR) manages the communication and relationships between a company and its investors, shareholders, analysts, and the financial community. We support the timely and accurate flow of information about our customers’ financial performance and strategy, which is crucial for boosting investor confidence, engaging shareholders, and strengthening corporate reputation.

Join Us and Make an Impact

We’re always looking for passionate, driven individuals to be part of our team. If you’re ready to grow, innovate, and contribute to a culture of trust and transparency, we’d love to meet you. Explore our current openings and take the next step in your career with us!
